chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4665 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 17-02-2025 Mr. Shaikh Noor Muhammad Advocate holds brief for Mr. Afaq Yousuf Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh The prayer clause of petition demonstrates that the Petitioner seeks implementation of orders passed by the Member, Land Utilization Department irrespective of the nature of the said orders it is conceivable that the orders of the government functionaries are sought to be implemented before a D.B. of this Court. Petition is found misconceived and dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
